title: ISC Biotrop 2026
text:
Data-Driven Insights into Tropical Biodiversity

6-9 July 2026 (Online Pre-Course) | 13-22 July 2026 (Onsite Course)


@ Universitas Gadjah Mada, Yogyakarta, Indonesia

title: ISC Biotrop 2026
text:
Sponsorship Details
ISC Biotrop 2026 is supported by the Universitas Gadjah Mada (UGM) Equity Grant, which helps facilitate the mobility of invited speakers and strengthens international collaboration.
To further enhance the quality and accessibility of the program, we welcome additional sponsorship from institutions and organizations that share our commitment to advancing tropical biodiversity research, education, and conservation.
For sponsorship inquiries and partnership opportunities, please contact: oia.biology@ugm.ac.id
